table_description: B2B SaaS customer accounts — company info, acquisition source, and lifecycle status.
use_cases: Customer segmentation by industry, size, or source
data_quality_notes: status is 'active', 'churned', or 'trial' — always check against subscriptions for ground truth
signup_date is DATE (not TIMESTAMP) — no time component

table_columns.name: industry
table_columns.description: Industry vertical: technology, healthcare, finance, retail, education

table_columns.name: country
table_columns.description: Two-letter country code (US, UK, DE, etc.)

table_columns.name: source
table_columns.description: Acquisition channel: organic, referral, paid, partner
